mainEntity.name: SSDI eligibility post-forklift permanent disability Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: SSDI eligibility post-forklift permanent disability Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Apply after 312 comp weeks exhaust; offset reduces SSDI until comp ends.

suggestedAnswer.text: Bountiful claimants qualify faster with attorney SSDI filing concurrent. Avoid overpayment traps.

name: SSDI After Forklift Permanent Disability Bountiful
